LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS/CROSS DEFENDANTS GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG AND KYLE LAU'S MOTION TO SPECIAL INTEROGGATORIES, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTIONS OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND TWO AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT ROY LAM SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SETS ONE AND TWO, WITHOUT OBJECTION, NO LATER THAN MARCH 25, 2013. DEFENDANT ROY LAM ADMIT THAT THEY FAILED TO TIMELY SERVE RESPONSES. (OPP., TAYLOR DECL., 2.) MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $ 1,500.00 ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ROY LAM TO BE PAID NO LATER THAN APRIL 5, 2013.(PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/AJR

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG and KYLE LAU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is OFF-CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ROY LAM, DIVINIA LEE, YOOGO CORPORATION & ADVINITI CORPORATION's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Continued to April 22, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give plaintiff the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. (Plaintiff delivered courtesy copies of its opposing papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date prior to the hearing. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Mtn To Special Interoggs
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS/CROSS DEFENDANTS GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG and KYLE LAU'S Motion To Special Interoggatories, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTIONS OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND TWO AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - Motion is Granted. Defendant Roy Lam shall serve verified responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One, and Request for Production of Documents, Sets One and Two, without objection, no later than March 25, 2013. Defendant Roy Lam admit that they failed to timely serve responses. (Opp., Taylor Decl., 2.) Monetary sanctions of $ 1,500.00 are awarded in favor of Plaintiffs and against Defendant Roy Lam to be paid no later than April 5, 2013.(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/AJR

Mtn To Special Interoggs
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Continued To Mar-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN BLACK, ESQ., 415.926.7630, FOR PLAINTIFFS GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG AND KYLE LAU.
WILLIAM TAYLOR, ESQ., 415.777.1688, FOR DEFENDANTS ROY LAM AND YOOGO CORP.

RULING: The parties did not stipulate to the Pro Tem Judge. The matter was argued. Report and Recommendation prepared. PLAINTIFFs GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG & KYLE LAU's motion to compel Special Interoggatories is Continued to MARCH 5, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge ProTem: JAMES WATSON, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Set For Trial On May-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT LOCKWOOD, ESQ., AND MARK (HSIAO) MAO, ESQ., KAUFMAN DOLOWICH VOLUCK & GONZO, 415.926.7600, FOR PLAINTIFFS GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG AND KYLE LAU.
SAM WU, ESQ., TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE, 415.777.1688, FOR DEFENDANTS YUUGO CORP ET AL.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFS GRX LLC, ANNIE CHUNG and KYLE LAU's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings and Request for Judicial Notice is denied. Whether the Trademark Licensing Agreement is a franchise agreement is a factual issue that is not amenable for determination on a motion for judgment on the pleadings. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
